catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for Regional High Resolution Sea Ice Charts covering Svalbard and Greenland, providing details on data access, product description, file format, nomenclature of files, grid type, geographical projection, update time, and temporal extent of analysis and forecast stored on delivery mechanism.

product_line.name: Regional High Resolution Sea Ice Charts for Svalbard and Greenland Region
